ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_number" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the size */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "outseam" REAL /* Outseam measurement in inches */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., standard, plus, petite) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the category is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size specification for the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the design of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the product is made of */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse holding the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be placed */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the inventory record was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Customer's birthday */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the design was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)
